lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
The vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor signs of wear on the interior and exterior. All mechanical systems are functional and have been properly maintained.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The interior and exterior show significant damage and wear. Mechanical systems are currently failing and require substantial repairs.

Get ready to hit the road in this dependable daily driver! While it shows some honest character through normal wear and tear, this car remains a reliable choice for anyone looking for value. It's been a steady companion and is in fair condition, ready to take you on your next journey with confidence!

This vehicle is in truly impeccable, showroom condition, representing the pinnacle of its model's care and maintenance. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Every panel is perfectly aligned, and the trim remains in like-new condition. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the upholstery shows zero wear, and all electronic features and climate controls function exactly as they did the day the car left the factory. Mechanically, it is in perfect health, with a complete service history and no upcoming maintenance needs. It drives smoothly and quietly, offering a driving experience that feels brand new. This is a rare find for a collector or an enthusiast seeking a vehicle in mint condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy. The exterior shows its age with several large dents, noticeable rust spots on the wheel arches, and clear coat failure on most panels. Inside, the interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the fabric seats and a cracked dashboard. Mechanically, the car starts but has a rough idle and a persistent oil leak, and the brakes will need immediate replacement. This is a project car being sold strictly as-is, ideal for someone with the skills to restore it or for use as a parts vehicle.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and long-term value. Characterized by its robust mechanical history and well-preserved interior, the automobile has passed our comprehensive quality assessment with distinction. It remains a steadfast example of engineering excellence, offering a sophisticated driving profile and dependable operation for the road ahead.

Hey there! I'm selling my awesome car, and it's looking for a new home! It's in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. It drives like a dream and is perfect for anyone who wants a dependable ride that still looks great on the road. I've taken great care of it, and I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have. Let's get you behind the wheel for a test drive!

Presenting a 2004 BMW M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM ceiling. This example is equipped with the desirable Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable differential lock for optimal torque distribution. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and proactive subframe reinforcement, addressing key E46 chassis vulnerabilities. The suspension retains its sharp handling characteristics with refreshed bushings and dampers. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, the mechanical integrity is robust, offering the visceral, analog driving experience
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Runs well. Clear title.

This vehicle is a prime example of pride of ownership, presenting in excellent mechanical and aesthetic shape. The exterior paint retains a brilliant luster with only minimal, expected imperfections from light use. Inside, the cabin is smoke-free and well-preserved, featuring plush seating and fully operational technology. It has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a documented history of preventative maintenance, including recent tire and fluid updates. It offers a tight, responsive driving experience with no unusual noises or vibrations. This car represents a perfect middle ground for a buyer looking for a dependable, high-quality vehicle without the new-car price tag.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Our rigorous inspection process ensures that this model meets high standards of performance and reliability, providing an exceptional balance of sophistication and value. A distinguished choice for those who demand quality without compromise.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver. It features a robust powertrain and a well-preserved interior, offering a refined driving experience that balances performance with proven reliability. Every major system has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for safety and roadworthiness. We invite you to secure a sophisticated automotive investment that delivers consistent excellence and professional-grade quality.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolutely wonderful to me. It's in great shape and runs like a dream—perfect for your daily commute or a weekend getaway! I’ve taken really good care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road with a new owner. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This high-revving powerplant delivers linear torque through a precise 6-speed manual gearbox to the M Variable Differential. The chassis remains taut, utilizing Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and aluminum multi-link suspension for superior
Used car in good condition. Maintenance up to date. Clean title. Runs well. Minor interior wear. Ready for inspection.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect blend of performance and comfort, making it an ideal choice for a discerning buyer. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with responsible ownership. Inside, the smoke-free cabin features well-preserved upholstery, fully functional electronics, and a clean dashboard. Mechanically, the car is in strong standing, having undergone regular servicing with a complete maintenance log available for review. It shifts smoothly, brakes firmly, and the engine runs quietly without any known leaks or issues. Recently fitted with a fresh set of tires and having passed a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this car is turn-key and ready for its next journey. A reliable, high-quality daily driver that has been treated with care.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which offers a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this model demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and a clean aesthetic profile. It represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle at a competitive market valuation.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic presentation, it has been subjected to our rigorous multi-point inspection process to ensure optimal performance. With a clean history and well-preserved interior, this motorcar offers an ideal synthesis of reliability and sophisticated engineering.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained—perfect for anyone looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road. I’ve loved every mile in it, and I know you will too! It’s ready for its next adventure, so feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Available is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS. This example delivers linear power and exceptional throttle response through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis has been maintained for structural
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Regular service history. No mechanical issues.

This 2018 Lexus RX 350 is a prime example of luxury meeting reliability. Finished in a timeless Nebula Gray Pearl, the exterior remains vibrant with only minor, expected road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the Parchment leather interior has been meticulously maintained, showing no tears or significant stains, and the cabin retains its premium feel. All electronic features, including the high-resolution navigation and climate control systems, function perfectly. Mechanically, the vehicle is solid; it has been serviced regularly at authorized centers, and the engine provides a smooth, quiet power delivery. With a clean title and a well-documented maintenance history, this SUV offers a dependable and comfortable driving experience for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and sophisticated engineering. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. The exterior finish remains distinguished, while the interior reflects a high level of care and preservation. Ideally suited for the discerning driver who prioritizes long-term value and proven roadworthiness, this vehicle offers a premium driving experience at a competitive market valuation.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking an optimal balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and displaying consistent mechanical integrity, the car remains in commendable condition throughout. Every component has been evaluated to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic appeal. A sophisticated choice for those who demand excellence without compromise.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that still looks awesome on the road? I'm parting with my favorite car, and it’s been treated like family. It runs super smoothly, looks great, and is totally ready for your next adventure. You’re going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW’s high-revving S54B32 powerhouse. The 3.2L inline-six features individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline, delivering linear power through a precise 6-speed manual transmission. Critical enthusiast maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and reinforced rear subframe mounting points to ensure chassis rigidity. The factory limited-slip differential provides exceptional corner-exit traction, while the suspension remains composed with refreshed bushings and dampers. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with a driven car, its mechanical integrity and drivetrain response remain sharp, making it an ideal candidate for the driver who prioritizes performance and engineering pedigree.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This meticulously cared-for 2018 BMW X5 xDrive35i represents the ideal fusion of utility and German engineering. The exterior is finished in a timeless Mineral White Metallic that retains a deep, glossy luster, showing only the lightest evidence of road use consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of Mocha Dakota leather and brushed aluminum trim; the upholstery is supple, free of any punctures or unpleasant odors, and the dual-zone climate control and heated seats function perfectly. Mechanically, this vehicle is exceptionally sound. It has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a smooth-shifting 8-speed automatic transmission and a responsive turbocharged engine that provides effortless power. The 19-inch alloy wheels are wrapped in premium tires with ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. Every electronic component, from the navigation system to the panoramic sunroof, has been tested and operates as intended. This is a dependable, high-quality vehicle ready for its next owner to drive home today.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a sophisticated driving experience and reliable performance. Each component has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and longevity.
